CREATE TABLE test_array_compact (id Int32, values Array(Float64));
INSERT INTO test_array_compact VALUES (1, [1, 1, nan, nan, 2, 3, 3, 3]);
INSERT INTO test_array_compact VALUES (3, [nan, 1, 2, nan, 3, nan]);
SELECT id, arrayCompact(values) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(arrayUnion(values, [1, 2, 2, 3])) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(arrayConcat(values, [1, 2, 2, 3])) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
WITH (SELECT arrayCompact([1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3]) AS compact_vals) SELECT compact_vals FROM test_array_compact LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(array_filter(values, x -> x IS NOT nan)) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values)) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(arraySlice(values, 1, 5)) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact;
WITH (SELECT arrayCompact(values) FROM test_array_compact WHERE id = 2) AS compact_vals SELECT * FROM test_array_compact WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(val) AS compacted_values FROM another_table;
SELECT a.id, arrayCompact(a.values) AS compacted_values FROM test_array_compact a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = 1;
